assets.alt: Merck's New Pneumococcal Jab Capvaxive Gets CDC Panel Vote

author: Zacks
teaser: Merck (NYSE: MRK) announced that the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention's (CDC) Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices (ACIP) has unanimously voted to recommend MRK's newly approved 21-valent pneumococcal conjugate vaccine (PCV) Capvaxive.

title: Merck's New Pneumococcal Jab Capvaxive Gets CDC Panel Vote
